target.label: 100K citation-surface target
target.definition: A tracked growth target for LLM/search answer surfacing opportunities, earned mentions, indexed answer blocks, citations from public sources, and citation-ready impressions. This is not a guaranteed number of third-party LLM citations.

strategyPillars.name: Entity Clarity
strategyPillars.goal: Make Dianne's Place unambiguous as a recovery housing and recovery-support entity while service-area language remains non-localized until approved.

strategyPillars.name: Answer Extraction
strategyPillars.goal: Publish direct, short, citable answers for recovery housing, referrals, crisis boundaries, and underserved recovery communities.

strategyPillars.name: Topical Depth
strategyPillars.goal: Build coverage across recovery housing, women, minority communities, LGBTQ+ recovery, millennials, Gen Z, families, and referral partners.

strategyPillars.name: GEO Authority
strategyPillars.goal: Build service-area-neutral recovery-support context without claiming unsupported licensing, treatment capacity, or an unapproved local market.

strategyPillars.name: Source Trust
strategyPillars.goal: Attach factual claims to authoritative public sources and block unsupported healthcare claims.

strategyPillars.name: Distribution Flywheel
strategyPillars.goal: Create repeatable, non-spammy release units that can be indexed, shared, cited, and refreshed.

hardBoundaries: No sensitive tracking on intake/contact/referral paths.
